hero.title: Tell Us Your Sourcing Requirements
hero.description: Share your product, packaging, quantity and destination market requirements. Our export team will help you prepare a suitable supply solution.

form.title: Inquiry Form
form.privacyNote: Your information is kept confidential and used only for communication regarding your inquiry.

message.label: Detailed Requirements
message.placeholder: Tell us your product, quantity, packaging and delivery requirements.
message.productTemplate: I would like to request a quote for {product}.

status.validationError: Please review the required fields and make sure the information is complete.
status.sendError: We could not send your inquiry at this time. Please try again or contact our export team directly.

items.planting: Own planting bases for key products
items.oem: OEM, private label and mixed containers

success.title: Thank You for Your Inquiry
success.description: Your request has been received. Our export team will review the information and contact you as soon as possible during business hours.

next.title: Our Team Will Review Your Requirements
next.description: We will use the information you provided to prepare the next steps for product sourcing and quotation.

review.title: Requirement Review
review.description: We review the selected product, estimated quantity, packaging and destination market.

contact.title: Export Team Contact
contact.description: A team member will contact you if additional product or shipment information is required.

solution.title: Supply Solution
solution.description: We prepare a suitable product, packing and export supply proposal for further discussion.

support.title: Need to add more information?
support.description: You can return to the inquiry page and submit additional product or sourcing requirements.
